name: coingecko api

meta.description: Full crypto market, DeFi, trending, exchanges, categories, OHLC, coin details

specs.name: compare_coins
specs.description:
Compare multiple coins side by side.
coin_ids: comma separated e.g. 'bitcoin,ethereum,solana,cardano'

specs.name: get_coin_categories
specs.description: Get all crypto categories with market cap and performance data.

specs.name: get_coin_details
specs.description:
Get complete data for a specific coin.
coin_id: bitcoin, ethereum, solana, binancecoin, ripple, cardano, dogecoin, avalanche-2

specs.name: get_coin_history
specs.description:
Get historical price, market cap and volume data.
coin_id: bitcoin, ethereum, solana etc.
days: 1, 7, 14, 30, 90, 180, 365, max

specs.name: get_coin_ohlc
specs.description:
Get OHLC candlestick data for a coin.
days: 1, 7, 14, 30, 90, 180, 365

specs.name: get_coin_price
specs.description:
Get price for one or more coins.
coin_ids: comma separated e.g. 'bitcoin,ethereum,solana,binancecoin,ripple'
currencies: comma separated e.g. 'usd,eur,gbp,btc'

specs.name: get_defi_overview
specs.description: Get global DeFi market overview: DeFi market cap, volume, ETH dominance.

specs.name: get_exchanges
specs.description: Get top crypto exchanges by trading volume.

specs.name: get_global_market
specs.description: Get global crypto market stats: total market cap, BTC/ETH dominance, DeFi, volume.

specs.name: get_supported_currencies
specs.description: Get all supported vs_currencies on CoinGecko.

specs.name: get_top_coins
specs.description: Get top N coins by market cap with full market data.

specs.name: get_trending_coins
specs.description: Get top trending coins, NFTs and categories on CoinGecko right now.

specs.name: search_coin
specs.description: Search for a coin, exchange or category by name. e.g. 'bitcoin', 'binance', 'defi'
